brand_voice_note: Confident and blunt category-leader voice that names exactly what buyers want gone and reassures on price and support.

concepts.product_title: No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market - AWESOME WATER®
concepts.primary_text:
Fluoride in your tap water? Filter it out.

The Awesome Water Ceramic Fluoride Dome Filter is the No 1 Fluoride Filter On The Market, built to reduce fluoride and other unwanted contaminants from your everyday drinking water.

Use it on its own or as part of a complete home filtration bundle. Better water, every single day.
concepts.headline: The No 1 Fluoride Filter
concepts.why_it_works: Fluoride removal is the specific, named problem this filter solves, so leading with that friction speaks directly to what the buyer is searching for.

concepts.primary_text:
Water the way it should taste.

The Ultimate Hydration System takes your water through a premium process: filter, remove fluoride, remineralise, alkalise and hydrogen enrich.

This is not just another filter bundle. It is a complete hydration system for better drinking water at home. 💧
concepts.headline: Ultimate Hydration System
concepts.why_it_works: This product's appeal is the elevated end result of the full multi-stage process, so leading with the desirable water experience fits a premium, all-in-one system.

concepts.product_title: Awesome Water® - Paragon CP-4 - Filtration System. (New 2024)
concepts.primary_text:
Advanced under-sink filtration for $499 (was $898).

The Paragon CP-4 is a tankless under-sink system designed to reduce ultra-fine particles, heavy metals, VOCs and forever chemicals from your drinking water.

Backed by our Price Beat Guarantee and 24 Hour Help Line, so ordering is easy and low-risk.
concepts.headline: Paragon CP-4 - Now $499
concepts.why_it_works: At a higher price point the main hesitation is cost and risk, so pairing the real sale price with the Price Beat Guarantee and support line removes the barrier to buying.
